nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Dusky tetraka
nodes.summary: Dusky tetraka（Dusky tetraka，学名 Crossleyia tenebrosa），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss. In 2023, three individuals were discovered in northern Madagascar after it was assumed that the species had gone extinct due to threats to its habitat
